synthetic_surfaces.name: otlp_http_log_export
synthetic_surfaces.operation: POST synthetic OTLP JSON log record to OTLP_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT
synthetic_surfaces.output: endpoint hash, response status, response hash

synthetic_surfaces.name: eval_store_record_write_read_delete
synthetic_surfaces.operation: wrangler d1 execute against CLOUDFLARE_D1_DATABASE_NAME with synthetic eval-store record
synthetic_surfaces.output: database name hash, table hash, record hash, operation count

pass_conditions: OTLP endpoint returns a 2xx response for the synthetic log export
D1 eval-store smoke table is created
synthetic eval-store record is inserted and selected back with matching schema_version/result/record_json
synthetic eval-store record is deleted and smoke table is dropped
output contains no OTLP header values, raw response body, prompt text, token, secret, or password
